title: Murder Drones: Absolute Execution
description: In a near future, the DEFINITIVE Murder Drones mod.
body:
## DEVELOPMENT EXTREMELY SLOWED DOWN! (sorry about this, but Murder Drones unfortunately already lost it's hype. I don't know if I'm going to keep working on this one.)
**_REQUIRES GECKOLIB!_**

# **Welcome to Murder Drones: Absolute Execution!**

Survive in a world where everything is being consumed by [REDACTED]. This mod introduces new challenges, ores, and tools, including Ironium and Amenithium sets, to help you navigate this dangerous world. The new tools and armor provide vital protection against the new-found threats lurking in the mod, enhancing both your defense and offense.

Ironium and Amenithium gear are essential for surviving the perils of this world, offering unique benefits that will aid you as you face the unknown.

The mod’s main feature centers around the choice of playing as either a Worker Drone or a Human, each with its own strengths and abilities. The Worker Drones are autonomous machines created by JCJenson, designed to be faster and stronger than humans. As a Worker Drone, you’ll gain enhanced abilities, but beware, JCJenson reported a few malware reports in your region, be sure to keep your JCOS Free Firewall up-to-date!
Unless...

As a Human, you hold admin rights over Worker Drones, including the ability to install updates and security patches to their systems (coming soon!). Humans aren’t as vulnerable to [NULL], unlike the Worker Drones. Unless something unexpected happens...

---

Now, to the unfortunate Worker Drones who couldn't escape from The Absolute Solver (a.k.a [NULL]), try to find the cure ASAP!
Being infected by it must have some benefits, but things only get bad.
D0n't g3t tr1ck3d!

---

In addition to the Worker Drones and Humans, this mod will soon add more exciting new dimensions, more ores, materials, an energy system, mobs, and an evolving lore that will immerse you in the mod.

Please note: The mod is currently in Alpha Testing, so expect some bugs and unfinished features.
